datasetLabel: eMARG public Know Your Road maintenance records
sourcePublisher: National Rural Infrastructure Development Agency, Ministry of Rural Development, Government of India

semantics.consolidatedGrossExpenditureInr: Road-level maintenance expenditure shown by the eMARG public road-detail response; not a sanction or estimate.
semantics.maintenanceStartDateRaw: Maintenance contract start date; not a physical relaying date.
semantics.actualMaintenanceCompletionDateRaw: Maintenance-contract completion field when published; not a physical relaying date.
